applied_optimizations.name: Add int4_w4a16 support to tuning infrastructure
applied_optimizations.description: Added use_int4_w4a16 parameter to get_config_filename, benchmark_config, and BenchmarkWorker methods. Added int4 tensor creation logic with uint8 packed weights and group-wise scales. Added int4_w4a16 to argparse dtype choices.

applied_optimizations.name: Create tuned config files for Kimi K2.5 (E=384, N=128)
applied_optimizations.description: Created config files with optimized block sizes for different batch sizes. Small batches (1-32) use smaller blocks (32-64), medium batches (64-256) use medium blocks (128), large batches (512+) use larger blocks (256). Achieves ~1.45-1.55x geometric mean speedup.

attempted_but_failed.name: Aggressive small block configs for small batches
attempted_but_failed.reason: Configs with very small blocks (BLOCK_SIZE_M=16) caused severe regressions at large batch sizes

attempted_but_failed.name: Manual micro-benchmark tuning
attempted_but_failed.reason: Tuning script timed out due to large config search space

top_bottlenecks: fused_moe kernel at small batch sizes (M=512, 2048) shows only ~1.08x speedup

notes: Tier 1: 10/10 - Config files exist with correct format
Small batch sizes (512, 2048) are limited by default config already being well-tuned
